title: pilosella auriculoides subsp. sarmentosa
intro: Pilosella auriculoides subsp. sarmentosa is a plant species belonging to the family Rosaceae and is also known as woolly cinquefoil. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues and fever. The health benefits of Pilosella auriculoides subsp. sarmentosa include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can aid in reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in folk medicine to treat a range of ailments, although its effectiveness and safety for human consumption have not been extensively scientifically proven.
